name: local-kind-docker-fixed
kubeConfig:
apiVersion: v1
clusters:
- cluster:
     server: https://host.docker.internal:62399
     insecure-skip-tls-verify: true
  name: kind-local
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: kind-local
    user: kind-local
  name: kind-local
current-context: kind-local
kind: Config
users:
- name: kind-local
  user:
    client-certificate-data: 
    client-key-data:
